channel.title: Beyond Code on mgalalm - blog
channel.description: Recent content in Beyond Code on mgalalm - blog

item.title: Replacing a Faulty Extractor Fan With Chatgpt S Help
item.description:
When my extractor fan stopped working, it made a loud noise and gave off a burning smell. I switched it off, knowing it was time for a replacement. Not being an expert, I removed the cover, snapped a photo of the fan, and consulted ChatGPT. It identified the model and explained the wiring, giving me confidence to proceed.

Amazon had a replacement, but delivery wouldn’t arrive before Christmas. Adding to the challenge, finding an electrician to fix it during the holiday season would have been nearly impossible, despite the cost. I headed to Screwfix, where they suggested a similar alternative. Unsure if it would work, I checked with ChatGPT again and got the go-ahead. Reassured, I bought the fan.

item.title: Some Table Topics With the Help of Grok2
item.description:
1. What happens when Santa holds an election for Head Elf? Campaign promises and all

  1. If you could invent a toy that would be loved by children from every culture, what would it be?

  1. How can we tell if brain microchip technology is already being used in society today?

  2. You’re stuck in the longest line during Christmas shopping, and you really need to get ahead. What creative (and completely ridiculous) excuses do you use to cut the line without anyone noticing?
